final:
module GPIO_Controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire out_en,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (out_en) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end
    
endmodule
